title: Find My Device -  Pin for headset location
scenario: Find My Device map merges multiple headset pins into a single count icon when devices are at the same location
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure GPS location access is granted to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. Tap on the 'Find My Device' feature (e.g., a map icon or menu option).
5. Observe the map view showing the location of connected headsets.
6. Verify that connected headsets display a blue geo icon on the map.
7. Disconnect a headset from the app or turn it off.
8. Observe the map view again for the disconnected headset.
9. Verify that disconnected headsets display a gray geo icon on the map.
10. Connect multiple headsets and bring them to the same physical location.
11. Observe the map view for overlapping device pins.
12. Verify that multiple headsets at the same location show a merged pin with a count number (e.g., a circle with a number indicating how many devices are at that spot).
expected: Connected headsets show a blue geo icon on the map. Disconnected headsets show a gray geo icon. Multiple headsets at the same location show a merged pin with a count number.
